design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Banjo-Kazooie through its core platformer loop.

gdd_outline.combat_notes: Simple melee and egg shooting; boss fights are pattern puzzles with move requirements.
constraints: Note totals gate world exit scores
Jiggies required for hub door progression
Moves taught in hub before gating in worlds
gdd_outline.core_loop: Enter hub-connected worlds, collect notes and jiggies, learn new moves from Bottles, use abilities to reach gated areas, defeat world bosses for jiggies, and unlock more hub doors.
gdd_outline.economy_notes: Collectibles are progression currency; no shop economy in classic structure.
gdd_outline.overview: Banjo-Kazooie is a 3D collectathon platformer where Banjo and Kazooie hub from Gruntilda's lair into themed worlds, collecting jiggies and notes to unlock new stages and abilities.
player_goals: Collect enough jiggies to reach final confrontation
Acquire all transformation and mobility moves
gdd_outline.progression_notes: Bottles teaches moves at hub pads; transformations expand per-world verbs.

mechanics.expression: Jiggies expand Gruntilda's lair; notes gate move tutorials and 100-note doors.
mechanics.map_notes: Jiggies expand Gruntilda's lair; notes gate move tutorials and 100-note doors.

mechanics.map_notes: Gruntilda's lair hub connects to nine worlds via jigsaw piece expansion.

narrative.core_loop: Collect jiggies and notes in hub-linked worlds, learn moves from Bottles, transform via Mumbo, and climb Gruntilda's lair to rescue Tooty.
narrative.description: Rare's N64 collectathon defines the genre with Gruntilda's lair hub, jigsaw piece expansion, and move-teaching Bottles sequences across nine themed worlds.
